prompt:
Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: README hero banner background, wide landscape crop-safe
Primary request: Create a polished text-free hero banner image for an open-source Agent Skill Toolkit public repository. The image should feel like a premium developer workbench for reusable AI skills.
Scene/backdrop: clean modern desktop/workbench abstraction with modular skill cards, subtle workflow lines, small command palette shapes, and five lifecycle nodes from left to right.
Subject: reusable agent skills becoming a clear workflow; public open-source package; Codex and Claude Code friendly.
Style/medium: high-end editorial product illustration, semi-3D glass and soft-matte shapes, crisp but not busy.
Composition/framing: wide landscape banner composition, visual energy on the left and center, calm negative space for readable title overlay on the right; safe margins; no important details at edges.
Color palette: off-white base, ink black, cyan, green, yellow accent, small coral accent; avoid purple gradients and dark blue monotone.
Lighting/mood: bright, trustworthy, sophisticated, practical.
Text: no text.
Constraints: no letters, no words, no watermark, no people, no robots, no logos, no screenshots, no blurry background.
